economic_notes: Council has been under receivership-administrator since August 8, 2019 for all SAC-funded programs. GBEs include: 9101-2658 Quebec inc. (Residence au Soleil Levant - long-term care facility), 9323-8996 Quebec inc. (Traiteur W - catering), Le Grand Royal Wolinak S.E.C. (entertainment centre), and 9417-6831 Quebec inc. Carrefour Wolinak inc. is fully consolidated. The audit is qualified because the two wholly-owned enterprises (Residence au Soleil Levant and Traiteur W) were not consolidated as required by PSAS.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - two wholly-owned enterprises (9101-2658 Quebec inc. / Residence au Soleil Levant and 9323-8996 Quebec inc. / Traiteur W) were accounted for using modified equity method instead of full consolidation as required by PSAS. Council has been under receivership-administrator since August 8, 2019 for all SAC-funded programs. Restricted cash includes CMHC replacement reserve ($182,195), Ottawa trust fund ($11,718), and bond investments ($3,045,932). Revenue breakdown by individual line not fully available from text; departmental summary used. The accumulated surplus of $10,093,081 is the consolidated total. Prior year accumulated surplus $9,890,677. Grand Royal Wolinak S.E.C. is a new entity (entertainment centre) with assets of $2,659,554. Financing includes new BMO loan of up to $925,000 for construction. Two-year funding agreement with SAC concluded after year-end to March 31, 2023.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
